name: Garlic Cheese Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. Combine Bisquick and 1/4 teaspoon of the garlic powder; mix in the cheese.
3. Add milk, stirring just until dry ingredients are moistened.
4. Roll or pat dough on a lightly floured surface to 1/2 inch thickness; cut with a 1 1/2-inch cutter.
5. Place on a lightly greased baking sheet.
6. Combine melted butter and the remaining 1/8 teaspoon of the garlic powder; brush on top of biscuits.
7. Bake for 10 minutes or until golden.
